markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Restructure GTM meetings and align on strategy for content, events, and community.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GTM meetings are now bi-weekly** to shift focus from status updates to strategic discussion and decision-making, supported by new lane-specific weekly syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**The community launch is a success (\~150 paying members)**, generating revenue comparable to a client. The focus now shifts to building a signature content program, starting with a core course.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [**A new holiday gifting process will be tested** using Gilded Box to simplify logistics and empower delivery directors to select gifts for key client contacts.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [**The podcast will be formalized into two formats**—high-profile interviews and practical workshops—to create a more consistent cadence and reduce post-production effort.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)

## Topics

### GTM Meeting Restructure

  - [**Problem:** Weekly GTM meetings have become inefficient status updates for a growing team.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift to a bi-weekly cadence focused on strategic discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [**New Cadence:** Weekly syncs for individual lanes (Events, Content, Community) will handle day-to-day updates.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [**New Goal:** This bi-weekly meeting will focus on surfacing issues, making decisions, and aligning on cross-lane strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [**New Process:** Pre-read notes and flag discussion topics the day before to maximize meeting time.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Community & Content Strategy

  - [**Community Launch Success:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Members:** \~150 paying members.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [**Revenue:** Comparable to a client, with high scalability.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [**Engagement:** Active content consumption and discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Strategic Direction:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
      - [**Goal:** Evolve the community into a content-heavy, premium destination (inspired by Reforged, Maven).](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
      - [**Anchor Content:** A signature course is the top priority to provide core value.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
          - [**Delivery:** Test a live cohort format for the first offering, with a goal of eventually charging $500–$1,000.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Website Feed:** The public feed was hidden due to low-value posts. The site will be redesigned to better showcase high-value content.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
  - [**Podcast Systemization:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current ad-hoc process requires heavy post-production and lacks a consistent cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
      - [**Solution:** Formalize into two distinct formats to improve consistency and reduce prep time.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)
          - [**Format 1 (High-Profile):** In-studio interviews with major figures (e.g., Anna, Gene Konto).](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)
          - [**Format 2 (Practical):** Virtual workshops with domain experts (e.g., Caleb on LinkedIn branding).](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
      - [**Process:** Will and Jesus will manage pre-production (scheduling, prep materials) to minimize host involvement.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)

### Events & Holiday Gifting

  - [**Upcoming Events:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [**CMO Dinner (This Wednesday):** 22 registrations, including execs from Kramerly, Deep Kram, Cursor, and Hex.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [**CMO Breakfast (Dec 4):** Promotion launched today; outreach is segmented by Luma status (email vs. LinkedIn).](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [**Lovable Workshop:** A final promotional push is planned next week before the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Event Roles & Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
      - [**Casey Event:** Content team will define the program → Gloria manages logistics → Understory provides project management.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
      - [**Client Retention:** Delivery directors must provide lists of key clients for event invites.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Holiday Gifting Program:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current manual process is inefficient and doesn't leverage delivery directors' client knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [**Solution:** Test Gilded Box to automate logistics and empower directors.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
          - [**Process:** Directors select a gift box for a client contact → Gilded Box handles shipping.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
          - [**Budget:** Propose a $85–$120 range for most clients, with a special tier for key accounts (e.g., Surge, Augment).](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

### Demand Gen & Ops

  - [**Audience Segmentation:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2625.0)
      - [**Status:** In progress. Kyle is building canonical segments (e.g., "Customers," "Bay Area") to enable turnkey event targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2780.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Requires complete HubSpot tagging, which is delayed by a delivery team restructuring.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [**Tech Stack & Automation:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)
      - [**Zoom Webinar:** Upgrade to a team account to consolidate separate accounts (Jason's, Marcel's) and enable the EventHapply integration for automated data sync.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)
      - [**Luma → HubSpot Sync:** Automate data transfer from Luma to HubSpot (currently a manual CSV upload) once the Zoom integration is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=3029.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Review the "Lanes" document to define goals for each GTM area.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Provide an overview for the Casey event program.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
      - [Share a list of personal client contacts with Kyle for HubSpot tagging.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2813.0)
  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [Send the CMO Dinner attendee list to the team today.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [Send the final promotional email for the Lovable Workshop next week.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Marissa:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [Finalize holiday gift box mock-ups with Gilded Box.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [Propose gift box options in the $85–$120 range.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [**Danni:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Collaborate with Will and Jason to define the community's core course curriculum.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Work with Will to formalize the podcast production process.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [**Will:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2213.0)
      - [Demo the new podcast scheduling page with a potential guest from the CMO Dinner.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2213.0)
      - [Propose a redesign of the community site to be more content-centric.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2625.0)
      - [Continue building canonical audience segments in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2780.0)
      - [Work with Gloria to upgrade the Zoom account and set up the EventHapply integration.](https://fathom.video/share/B1hQPhzYCw9UnYFY8vjd-JdLFGpLiPp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)
